quality_note: Guided routes are generated from processed source metadata, theme hits, concept hits, and candidate equation/figure/quote counts. They are navigation aids, not final scholarly judgments.

routes.title: First Hour With Steinmetz
routes.audience: Curious readers, students, and visitors who need a humane entry before the dense technical books.
routes.why_it_exists: Begins with biography and visual source material, then moves from radiation and light into field language, AC calculation, and transients.
routes.reading_rule: Read the route links first, then open the source text for each section before using the workbench.

routes.title: Alternating Current, Complex Quantities, And Symbolic Method
routes.audience: Electrical students and engineers studying phasors, impedance, reactance, admittance, and complex notation.
routes.why_it_exists: Connects Steinmetz's practical AC calculation language to the modern phasor and complex-number method while preserving his notation.
routes.reading_rule: Move from symbolic method sections to equation pages and interactive phasor tools.

routes.title: Transients, Oscillations, Surges, And Tesla-Era Questions
routes.audience: Tesla-era researchers, transient-analysis students, and readers interested in high-frequency electrical behavior.
routes.why_it_exists: Routes the reader into Steinmetz's treatment of transient terms, condenser discharge, oscillation, waves, surges, and line behavior.
routes.reading_rule: Read transient source sections first, then compare with the Tesla-era and modern engineering interpretation pages.

routes.title: Fields, Ether References, Dielectricity, Magnetism, And Hysteresis
routes.audience: Historians of field language, ether-field readers, and engineers studying material and field behavior.
routes.why_it_exists: Gathers the most relevant source routes for field language while keeping explicit Steinmetz wording, modern physics, and interpretive readings separate.
routes.reading_rule: Begin with exact source contexts. Treat ether-field synthesis as interpretive unless a passage explicitly supports it.

routes.title: Mathematics, Equations, And Worked Calculation
routes.audience: Readers who want notation, derivation, formula translation, and computational tools.
routes.why_it_exists: Prioritizes equation-dense sections and connects them to the canonical equation set, notation ledger, and tools.
routes.reading_rule: Preserve Steinmetz's notation first, then translate into modern engineering form with the equation pages.

routes.title: Machines, Apparatus, Power Systems, And Practical Engineering
routes.audience: Engineers and historically minded readers following Steinmetz from theory into apparatus and grid behavior.
routes.why_it_exists: Collects machines, power-system trouble, reactors, synchronism, motors, transformers, losses, and operating behavior.
routes.reading_rule: Use the source sections to see how Steinmetz moves between mathematical theory and engineering diagnosis.

routes.why_it_exists: Separates the seeded patent register and authority workflow from book commentary while linking patents back to concepts and apparatus.
routes.reading_rule: Start with the patent register, then use the theory bridge and authority queue before treating any patent claim as verified.
